item.title: Good News – The Parley's Wildlife Overpass In Utah Is Working

item.title: Remember.
item.description: House Speaker Emerita Melissa Hortman (DFL-Brooklyn Park) and her husband, Mark, were fatally shot in their home by Vance Boelter, 57. Boelter embarked on a murderous rampage targeting Minnesota’s elected officials and their families.

item.description: Who would have thought in a few short years MAGA insists on wearing masks and a democrat passed a ban on them. Yes I know it's a different thing, but I still find it funny.

item.title: Misc Memes Vol 2
item.description: As always I'm clearing out some of the memes I spent a frankly absurd amount of time organizing into folders on my phone. As always, I Hope you all enjoyed. I used to post all of the links to my past posts below but the ends of these posts were getting a bit unwieldy. So, at the risk of overcomplicating things I've made a few (sometimes pretty loosely) categorized repositories of my past posts if you'd like to see more I'll link to those below. Movies, TV, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/qWQKZr5 Books, Comics, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/0unBaDX Gaming, Tech, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/17tib1E Food, Family, and Animals https://imgur.com/gallery/zlsjOQa Work, Politics and America https://imgur.com/gallery/zQrWXQE ADHD, Autism, Mental Health, and Millenial https://imgur.com/gallery/G1E6yWd Miscellaneous and Videos https://imgur.com/gallery/0k0ca7O NSFW Memes https://imgur.com/gallery/2I9HXEp Reactions https://imgur.com/gallery/uDjMX0P
item.dc:creator: GeeeButtersnaps

item.description: I hope these folks haven't been arrested yet.
item.dc:creator: elecvette

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1481 (LOTR Sunday)
item.description:
Let's get this lembas.
Also woke up with a wretched migraine this morning. Ugh.
Still no forward progress on the disability or front of finding a job i won't potentially fall asleep at.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Hello what doing? Peekaboo!" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Cute, wholesome video dump (+ cat tax)
item.description:
This is a collection of videos that make me happy.
And since they make me happy, I decided to share them with you.
Because I figured if they make me happy, then maybe they'll make you happy too.
Although I should warn you that half of them are baby elephant videos...
See?
But there's kitties too.
And piggies!
But yeah, lots of baby elephant videos.
And some more kitties.
And this is Sadie!
Oh hey look more baby elephant
Make sure your sound is on for these.
And of course you can't NOT include baby otter wiggles.
Mama showing baby how to roll around in the dirt.
And a baby seal!
Scared baby does a brave
Happy bee
I just really love elephants you guys.
And I also love otters, even when they're whiny and complainy.
Baby does a splishy splash
This one is so sweet it'll probably give you cavities.
More happy baby elephant splashies
BABYBARA
Little scamp wants to play with mama
LOST IN THE SAUCE
I would just let the little guy win every time
Even though it's highly illegal and extremely unethical, I really want one. :(
CAT TAX: Bean does a lounge. And since she does the loungiest lounge that any kitty has ever lounged, I made a couple of memes from it.
These are both 100% true facts. *** All done, thanks for looking. I hope you enjoyed it, and I hope it helped soothe your nervous system a little bit. Please remember to be kind to each other, and to yourself. <3
item.dc:creator: MizWeirdo

item.description:

The original by Chumbawamba - The Day the Nazi Died Viral Edit: more anti-fascist music https://imgur.com/gallery/bella-ciao-worldwide-partisan-song-oEX4Vpc

item.title: Pixie & Brutus: Invincibility - Part 1
item.description: Today's Tiabeanie Tax; Bean in a bag! Another bean-bag! If she fits, she sits. Bean loves bags of all shapes and sizes so long as they're big enough for her to hide inside of. Sorry for another late post. The next few days are probably going to be lots of late posts. If I miss a day, I apologize in advance. Preparing for surgery on Tuesday so lots of fun days of little sleep and lots of pain. Hopefully I'll see you all tomorrow!
item.dc:creator: TheUnnamedPoet
